reviewed_items.reviewer_notes: Code reading is factually correct (ELMemPoolRequirements is empty at verification/blob.go:77, GetBlobsV2 path at engine_client.go:714 calls NewVerifiedRODataColumn directly), but this is an explicit by-design trust boundary. Code comment at engine_client.go:706 states 'We trust the execution layer we are connected to.' BUG_BOUNTY_SCOPE.json documents Engine API as SEMI_TRUSTED with explicit acknowledgment that 'data returned by EL may not be fully verified by CL in all cases' (line 109) and 'attacks requiring a compromised local EL may be considered conditional or lower severity' (line 117). The finding requires a compromised local EL to exploit, which falls under the documented trust boundary exception. This is intentional design, not a vulnerability.
reviewed_items.spec_reference: SG-020 (compute_cells_and_kzg_proofs) defines cryptographic proof generation but does not mandate verification of all EL-sourced data. Trust boundary design choice.
